---
title: "argo bias"
subtitle: "project planning"
format:
  html:
    theme: darkly
    toc: true
    toc-title: "contents"
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right
    number-sections: false
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  prompt: true
  fig-align: center
  fig-width: 7.5
  fig-height: 4
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    prompt: false
    collapse: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# eda

- calc. radius of drift (by region)
- do floats replace eachother in the same area? eg does a float move out of an initial radius but a different float moves into that initial radius?
  - within a fixed region (basins) how much area is covered by the floats over time? do they begin to cluster or do they circle and replace eachother such that the same area is covered?
- discuss distance metrics to calc. velocity
